title: Duck Teddy, Duck Plush, 15cm Ducks Toy, Soft Plush Toy, Yellow Sweet Doll, Small Lovely Doll, Warm Plush Ducks Gifts For Valentine's Day Children's Day Birthday
features: 【Package Includes】1 Pcs yellow plush duckling, with a single warm yellow tone, dimensions about 15 cm high, made of high-quality plush fabric, soft and delicate touch. It contains padding to ensure that the duckling is full and not easy to deform.

【Easy to Carry】Duck toy, the overall design is exquisite, the details are in place, and is very convenient to take away for camping and outgoing, helping the kid to relieve anxiety and fall asleep faster, it is the perfect gift for children.

【Sweet and Lovely】The duckling looks sweet and cute, and its round body and bright yellow color make people fall in love at first sight, combining cute animal elements and warm plush texture, accompany you to spend a happy time.

【Easy to Clean】The cleaning of the duckling is very convenient, you can just brush it gently with little water, and then dry it in the sun, after cleaning, the duckling remains soft and fluffy, for toy's sake, please do not wash it in the machine.

【Warmth Gifts】The soft touch of the duckling can effectively relieve anxiety, not only a cute doll, but also a stress relief toy, whether it is for friends and family, or as a child's birthday gift, you can show your heart and care.
